title: Activate visited button, add restaurant detail page with ratings and notes, and add three restaurants to database

requirements.text: Update the 'Visited' button in frontend/src/components/RestaurantCard.tsx to turn solid green and display 'Visited' text when clicked, calling the useMarkVisited mutation hook to persist the visited status with the authenticated user's Principal and restaurant identifier

quotes: Make it so when a user clicks it, the button turns solid green and says 'Visited.'

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking the 'Mark as Visited' button triggers the useMarkVisited mutation
After successful mutation, the button changes to solid green background
The button text changes from 'Mark as Visited' to 'Visited'
The button state persists across page refreshes using the useIsVisited query

requirements.text: Verify frontend/src/pages/RestaurantDetailPage.tsx displays full restaurant information, includes a 5-star interactive rating selector that allows users to select 1-5 stars, and provides a text input field labeled 'My Private Notes' where users can type and save personal notes about what they ate

quotes: open a detail page that has a 5-star rating selector and a 'My Private Notes' text box where they can type what they ate

acceptanceCriteria: Restaurant detail page is accessible by clicking a restaurant card
Page displays complete restaurant information including name, cuisine, description, address, and image
5-star rating component allows user to select a rating from 1 to 5 stars
Selected rating is saved to backend using useSaveRating mutation
Text input field labeled 'My Private Notes' accepts user input
Notes are saved to backend using useSaveNote mutation
Previously saved ratings and notes are loaded on page mount using useGetRating and useGetNote queries

requirements.text: Add three new restaurant entries to the backend/main.mo restaurant data: (1) Taco Party in Grand Junction with cuisine type 'Mexican', a realistic Grand Junction street address, appropriate coordinates (~39.0639°N 108.5506°W), isHiddenGem set to true, and relevant vibe attributes; (2) Best Slope Coffee in Fruita with cuisine type 'Cafe', a realistic Fruita street address, appropriate coordinates (~39.1586°N 108.7287°W), isHiddenGem set to true, and relevant vibe attributes; (3) Bin 707 Foodbar in Grand Junction with cuisine type 'Fine Dining', a realistic Grand Junction street address, appropriate coordinates (~39.0639°N 108.5506°W), isHiddenGem set to true, and relevant vibe attributes

quotes: Please add Taco Party, Best Slope Coffee, and Bin 707 Foodbar to the database now so the home screen is full

acceptanceCriteria: Taco Party restaurant entry is added with Mexican cuisine type and Grand Junction location
Best Slope Coffee restaurant entry is added with Cafe cuisine type and Fruita location
Bin 707 Foodbar restaurant entry is added with Fine Dining cuisine type and Grand Junction location
All three restaurants have realistic street addresses matching their city
All three restaurants have appropriate latitude/longitude coordinates for their location
All three restaurants have isHiddenGem set to true
All three restaurants have appropriate vibe attributes (isPetFriendly, isNearRiverfrontTrail, isGreatForDate) set based on their characteristics
The directory home screen displays all restaurants including the three new entries

constraints: Do not modify immutable paths: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.tsx, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui
Use existing React Query hooks (useMarkVisited, useIsVisited, useSaveRating, useGetRating, useSaveNote, useGetNote) defined in frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts
Preserve Western Colorado rustic aesthetic and color palette
nonGoals: Adding any restaurants beyond the three specified (Taco Party, Best Slope Coffee, Bin 707 Foodbar)
Changing the restaurant detail page route structure
